name: github-mcp
description: Connects Claude to GitHub's MCP server via Docker. Gives Claude full access to GitHub tools — repos, issues, PRs, code search, and more.
long_description: Runs the official GitHub MCP server (ghcr.io/github/github-mcp-server) locally via Docker using a Personal Access Token. Supports all GitHub MCP capabilities including repos, issues, pull requests, code search, and more.

github_token.title: GitHub Personal Access Token
github_token.description: A classic PAT or fine-grained token with the scopes you need (e.g. repo, read:org). Create one at https://github.com/settings/tokens
